mitigations.name: Rate Limiting
mitigations.description: Redis-based rate limiting on authentication and high-risk endpoints

implementation.guidance: Use express-rate-limit with Redis store. 5 login attempts/min/IP, 3 password resets/hour/account.

mitigations.residual_risk: Distributed attacks from many IPs may still succeed at reduced rate

mitigations.name: JWT Security Hardening
mitigations.description: Enforce RS256 algorithm, proper validation, and token revocation

implementation.guidance: Enforce RS256 only, validate all claims, add jti for revocation, rotate keys quarterly

mitigations.residual_risk: Key compromise still possible but rotation limits exposure window

mitigations.name: Webhook Signature Verification
mitigations.description: Verify HMAC signatures on all inbound webhooks from Stripe and Checkr

implementation.guidance: Use stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(), implement Checkr HMAC per docs

mitigations.residual_risk: Webhook secret leakage would bypass; store in secrets manager

mitigations.name: Server-Side Price Validation
mitigations.description: Recalculate all order totals server-side, never trust client values

implementation.guidance: Calculate totals from menu prices server-side, use DB transactions, add idempotency keys

mitigations.residual_risk: Menu price manipulation still possible; combine with merchant validation

mitigations.name: Object-Level Authorization
mitigations.description: Authorization middleware checking resource ownership on all endpoints

implementation.guidance: Add user_id to all queries, use UUIDs for public IDs, implement automated BOLA testing

mitigations.residual_risk: Logic bugs in complex ownership may still exist

mitigations.name: Role Enforcement Middleware
mitigations.description: Centralized role checking on all role-specific endpoints

implementation.guidance: Create role middleware, define permissions matrix, enforce on all routes

mitigations.residual_risk: Missing annotation on new endpoints could create gaps

mitigations.name: Input Validation & Parameterized Queries
mitigations.description: Strict input validation and SQL injection prevention

implementation.guidance: Use parameterized queries (pg-promise), Joi/Yup validation, DOMPurify for HTML

mitigations.residual_risk: Complex dynamic queries may still have edge cases

mitigations.name: Secure File Upload Handler
mitigations.description: Validate file content, not just extension; scan for malware

implementation.guidance: Validate magic bytes, generate random names, scan with ClamAV, serve from separate domain

mitigations.name: Session Security Enhancement
mitigations.description: Secure cookie flags, token binding, and session management

implementation.guidance: HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite cookies, bind to fingerprint, revoke on password change

mitigations.residual_risk: XSS could still extract tokens if CSP bypassed

mitigations.name: OAuth Flow Hardening
mitigations.description: Strict redirect validation, PKCE, and state parameter enforcement

implementation.guidance: Whitelist redirect URIs, require PKCE for mobile, validate state parameter

mitigations.residual_risk: OAuth provider vulnerabilities outside platform control

mitigations.name: Admin Access Controls
mitigations.description: MFA requirement, rate limiting, and comprehensive logging for admin

implementation.guidance: Require TOTP for admin, limit queries to 100/hour, log all actions, export limits

mitigations.residual_risk: Compromised admin with valid MFA still has access

mitigations.name: Fraud Detection System
mitigations.description: Velocity checks, dispute tracking, and fraud pattern detection

implementation.guidance: Implement velocity rules, integrate Stripe Radar, flag high-dispute accounts

mitigations.residual_risk: Sophisticated fraud may evade pattern detection

mitigations.name: GPS Anomaly Detection
mitigations.description: Detect impossible GPS movements and spoofing patterns

implementation.guidance: Implement velocity checks, flag impossible jumps, track anomaly scores

mitigations.residual_risk: Sophisticated spoofing with realistic movement may pass

mitigations.name: Immutable Audit Logging
mitigations.description: Tamper-evident logging to separate write-only storage

implementation.guidance: Send to CloudWatch/S3 Object Lock, include hash chain, 7-year retention

mitigations.residual_risk: Events not logged are still invisible

mitigations.name: WebSocket Rate Limiting
mitigations.description: Connection limits and rate limiting for WebSocket endpoints
mitigations.residual_risk: Distributed attacks from many accounts harder to stop

mitigations.name: Content Security Policy
mitigations.description: Strict CSP headers to prevent XSS execution

implementation.guidance: script-src 'self' with nonces, report violations to monitoring

mitigations.residual_risk: CSP bypasses exist; defense in depth with input validation

mitigations.name: Phone Verification Hardening
mitigations.description: Add TOTP option and SIM swap detection

implementation.guidance: Offer authenticator apps, detect SIM swaps, delay recovery on phone change

mitigations.residual_risk: Users may not enable stronger MFA options

mitigations.name: Review Anti-Gaming
mitigations.description: Behavioral analysis and rate limiting for reviews

implementation.guidance: Min order value for reviews, detect coordinated activity, flag patterns

mitigations.residual_risk: Sophisticated gaming with real orders harder to detect
